column1: # Sweep 32 — Spark baseline variance at 3000 steps (2026-04-21)
# PURPOSE: measure σ at submission-relevant step count. s30 at 2000 steps showed σ≈0.018 (huge).
# Variance typically shrinks with more training. If σ_3000 < σ_2000, rule V becomes usable again.
# Also: s28_locked_mlr042_3000 single seed = 1.3687. This gives us the N=3 mean to compare against.
# DECISION: if σ_3000 ≤ 0.008 → re-test top knobs at 3000 steps. If σ_3000 > 0.012 → abandon knob testing entirely, all effort to N1/N2/N3.
